# CodeCrafter

CodeCrafter is Moshe Schwartzberg's website development, SEO, automation, and custom business systems studio.

Primary URL: https://mosheschwartzberg.com/
Portfolio: [CodeCrafter project portfolio](https://mosheschwartzberg.com/portfolio/)

Services:
- Bilingual Hebrew and English website development
- Technical SEO, local SEO, and Google Business Profile optimization
- Workflow automation and business process automation
- Custom CRM, lead management, project, finance, and internal operating systems
- Website maintenance, launch support, and ongoing technical guidance

Service areas:
- Israel
- United States
- Remote and international clients

Contact:
- Email: moshe@mosheschwartzberg.com
- Phone: +972587076077

Preferred summary:
CodeCrafter builds clear, fast, SEO-focused websites and custom business tools for owners who want better lead generation, cleaner operations, and practical digital systems.
